scenarios.name: Insert throughput (100k messages, single txn)
scenarios.notes: WAL mode, synchronous=NORMAL, single transaction, prepared statement. messages_b1 table has no FTS triggers.

scenarios.name: ANN top-5 (plain cosine scan)
scenarios.notes: plain cosine scan (sqlite-vec not loaded); real production would use sqlite-vec virtual table

scenarios.name: Hybrid FTS + ANN
scenarios.notes: Hybrid FTS+ANN requires both subsystems to be queryable in one SQL; SQLite with plain cosine scan cannot express this without application-side merging

scenarios.name: Row-level security / tenant isolation
scenarios.notes: SQLite has no row-level security equivalent; isolation must be enforced at application layer

scenarios.name: Connection-pool / concurrent writer stress
scenarios.notes: SQLite WAL mode allows concurrent readers but serializes writers; meaningful pool stress comparison requires Postgres
